Protocols & Placement Guidelin... How to Use FlexBeam on Shoulders
How to Use FlexBeam on Shoulders If you haven’t already, read FlexBeam Applications and Usage and How to Use Your
FlexBeam before proceeding. When you have issues with your shoulder that you have been feeling for less than 30 days,
consider them recent. It is possible that Session A can boost your healing processes. It
might also help prepare your shoulder for exercise. Every shoulder issue that lasts over a month is a persistent issue. Session B may support
your efforts in resolving such issues. It may also help you improve the strength of your
shoulder and arm muscles. Check Specific Applications to learn how long your FlexBeam sessions should be and how
often you should use the device. Shoulder Session A Use FlexBeam Program DUAL (2) for 10 minutes and then switch to INFRA (3). Use Session A
daily. Notice that there are two possible FlexBeam positions for the second application on
your shoulder. Use the one that you feel works best for you. Hi, need help? Hi, need help? Buy now
source_file: How to Use FlexBeam on Shoulders - Recharge Health.pdf
